title: Arjun Reddy
subTitle: Arjun Reddy Deshmukh, a young surgeon with functioning alcoholism and a furious temper, spirals into self-destruction when he learns that his girlfriend is marrying another man.

title: Aaha..!
subTitle: Sriram, a carefree guy, becomes a scapegoat and takes the blame on himself after he discovers a secret about his elder brother, Raghuram.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Prince
subTitle: A teacher becomes smitten with his British colleague. However, their relationship is soon tested by unforeseen challenges.

title: Adhurs
subTitle: Twin brothers, separated at birth, grow up in vastly different environments. However, they are reunited when one gets kidnapped by gangsters.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Yevadu
subTitle: Satya gets a different face after he is almost killed, but a new face multiplies his problems. His ordeal begins when he leaves the hospital and has to deal with his lover's murderer.

title: Daaku Maharaaj
subTitle: A brave thief fights to survive and claim his territory. However, he battles powerful enemies, aiming to become a leader without a real kingdom.

title: Mirchi
subTitle: Manasa falls in love with Jai after he helps her and manages to win the hearts of her family with his good deeds. However, she is unaware that he belongs to a rival family.

title: Satyam
subTitle: Satyam is a budding writer who is always misunderstood by his father. As he struggles to make a mark professionally, his personal life goes through a surprising turn.

title: Solo
subTitle: Gautam, an orphan, wishes to marry a woman from a joint family and his dream comes true when he falls in love with Vaishnavi. However, Vaishnavi's father is against their marriage.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Zombie Reddy
subTitle: Chaos ensue as Mario, a game developer, and his gang of friends get entangled in a family feud and an enigmatic zombie attack in Rayalaseema, while attending a friend's wedding.

title: Intlo Illalu Vantintlo Priyuralu
subTitle: When Sita is unable to bear a child, her husband, Sriram, gets married to Manisha. They have a son and Sriram decides to adopt him while hiding the truth from Sita.

title: Nuvve Nuvve
subTitle: Vishwanath is a millionaire who will do anything for his daughter, Anjali. When she falls in love with Rishi, a middle-class boy, he tries everything in his power to end the affair.

title: Vinaya Vidheya Rama
subTitle: Facing a menacing criminal kingpin, Ram fights to protect his family. Soon, he embarks on a daring mission to topple the villain and dismantle his corrupt empire.

title: Mad 2
subTitle: Laddu narrates his Goa adventure to jail visitors, where a stolen necklace, gangster Maxx and undercover cop Ashok lead to chaos, arrests and Laddu's jail time.

title: Salaar
subTitle: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Shock
subTitle: A young lady who stays alone in a bungalow believes that anyone who enters the house will be a trouble maker for her. She then deals with two men who come to her house on a rainy night.

title: Okkade
subTitle: A minister assigns Yugandhar, an honest police officer, to find a way to stop gang leader Subbarayudu and his followers who are running a parallel government.

title: Masthi Maja
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Calvary Darsanam
subTitle: Calvary Darsanam

title: Bhaagamathie
subTitle: Chanchala, an IAS officer, is imprisoned in a haunted house for interrogation. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets possessed by a spirit.

title: Mahanati
subTitle: Savitri, an energetic and jubilant child, grows up to become an actress. She faces several challenges and overcomes hurdles to become the first female superstar in South India.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Saakini Daakini
subTitle: Two police trainees set out on a dangerous mission in order to investigate the kidnapping of a girl from a nightclub when they fail to get the police's help.

title: Oh Baby
subTitle: A seventy-year-old woman frustrated with her life, blames God for her misfortune. Subsequently, she magically transforms into a twenty-four-year-old after getting her photo taken at a studio.

title: Gatta Kusthi
subTitle: Veera has a preconceived set of criteria for what he wants in a bride. However, he ends up unexpectedly marrying a woman who is the complete opposite of his expectations.
